source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Crane Other Lifting

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, West Cameron Block 96

event.top_event: Flash fire on water skimmer manway cover
actions_taken: All personnel mustered on Lift Boat New Orleans
BSEE on-site incident follow-up conducted on November 29, 2021
event.summary: On November 27, 2021, at approximately 09:30 am, a flash fire occurred while removing skid pads with a torch on the top deck at West Cameron Block 96 platform B. Slag and sparks from hot work operations fell onto the unsealed 24-inch manway cover of the water skimmer (MBM-0500), which contained undetermined amounts of condensate and combustible gas vapors. The fire self-extinguished immediately. Root causes included incomplete vessel cleaning, loose manway cover securing, lack of gas detection survey, inadequate fire-retardant tarp placement, and failure to conduct jobsite walkthroughs before permit approval.

hazards.name: Flammable hydrocarbon vapors in confined space
Hot work operations with ignition sources

threats.name: Condensate and combustible gas remaining in water skimmer after cleaning
Unsealed manway cover allowing gas vapor escape
Slag and sparks from hot work falling onto water skimmer
Inadequate fire-retardant tarp placement during hot work

consequences.name: Flash fire on water skimmer manway cover

controls.name: Vessel cleaning procedure and documentation
controls.barrier_role: Ensure water skimmer is rendered inert before hot work
controls.lod_basis: Preventive control to eliminate flammable vapors

supporting_text: A detailed cleaning procedure for the water skimmer was not developed by Talos for Trussco or available to BSEE investigators or PES during hot work activities
BSEE investigators determined the vessel had only been cleaned of sand and sludge, leaving an undetermined amount of condensate in the oil bucket of the vessel thus not rendering it inert

controls.name: Manway cover sealing and securing
controls.barrier_role: Prevent escape of combustible gas vapors from vessel
controls.lod_basis: Preventive control to contain flammable vapors

supporting_text: the Talos company representative allowed the 24-inch manway cover to be loosely secured to the vessel with only 4 bolts
This allowed gas vapors from the condensate remaining in the water skimmer to escape through the unsealed manway

controls.name: Gas detector survey before hot work
controls.barrier_role: Detect presence of combustible gas before hot work operations
controls.lod_basis: Detection control to identify hazardous atmosphere

supporting_text: The manway cover of the water skimmer was not surveyed with the gas detector prior to the hot work beginning on the deck above

controls.name: Fire-retardant tarp placement and management
controls.barrier_role: Prevent slag and sparks from reaching flammable materials
controls.lod_basis: Preventive control to shield ignition sources from flammable vapors

supporting_text: During the cutting of the skid pads, though the cutting area moved, the PES construction crew did not move the fire-retardant tarps from the previous work area
This allowed slag and sparks to fall directly onto the water skimmer manway cover igniting the combustible gas

controls.name: Jobsite walkthrough and hazard verification before permit approval
controls.barrier_role: Verify all hazards are identified and mitigated before work begins
controls.lod_basis: Preventive control to ensure hazard assessment accuracy

supporting_text: All forms were approved during the 06:00am meeting without visiting the jobsite to verify all hazards were remediated
Jobsite walkthroughs each morning to identify hazards and discuss mitigations were not being performed
during the interview one of the personnel was asked if the work area was inspected before permits were signed, he stated, 'no, because nothing changed from day to day'

controls.name: Flammable materials relocation and shielding
controls.barrier_role: Prevent flammable materials from being ignited by hot work
controls.lod_basis: Preventive control to isolate ignition sources from flammable materials

supporting_text: BSEE investigators did find totes with flammable contents and a flammable storage locker that were not shielded or moved 35 feet away from the hot work area

controls.name: Fire watch and monitoring during hot work
controls.barrier_role: Detect and respond to fire during hot work operations
controls.lod_basis: Mitigation control to detect and suppress fire

supporting_text: the fire watch noticed slag falling from hot work operations on the deck above onto the water skimmer manway cover
The fire watch secured a fire extinguisher and stepped back when the flash fire occurred on the manway cover

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
